sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56639" key="kentroqesi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κεντρο-θεσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n56639.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">arrangement of heavenly bodies on cardinal points</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:226:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">226.33</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
